validated_commands.note: mix not available in CI runner; tests validated by CI on merge

testing_notes.framework: ExUnit with DataCase (async: true), Factory via ex_machina
testing_notes.coverage_tool: excoveralls (mix coveralls.html); CI does not block on coverage thresholds
testing_notes.mix_unavailable: mix binary not in PATH in CI runner
testing_notes.mapper_test_pattern: Use ExUnit.Case async:true with struct!() helper + override map
testing_notes.struct_helper_pattern: Use struct!(ModuleName, Map.merge(defaults, overrides)) NOT Map.merge on a struct
testing_notes.query_builder_test_pattern: Inspect query.from.source, length(query.wheres), length(query.order_bys). No DB needed.
testing_notes.nil_guard_test_pattern: Use length(query.wheres) == 0 for no-op guard tests
testing_notes.enrollment_policy_queries_note: EnrollmentPolicyQueries tested with real DB (DataCase async:true); EnrollmentPolicyRepository.upsert/1 to create policies; 14 tests
testing_notes.invite_field_validations_note: InviteFieldValidations tested via embedded_schema in ExUnit.Case async:true; 18 tests
testing_notes.global_publisher_race_705: Issue #705: :participation_seed_roster_subscriber causes race; Mox fix recommended
testing_notes.accounts_command_test_pattern: RegisterUser/AnonymizeUser/ChangeEmail: DataCase async:true, AccountsFixtures, real UserRepository, no event assertions needed
testing_notes.incident_report_mapper_note: IncidentReportMapper: provider_profile_id (domain) <-> provider_id (DB); maybe_to_string nil-guard for program_id/session_id
testing_notes.provider_program_mapper_skip: ProviderProgramMapper is trivial pass-through - not worth testing per guidelines
testing_notes.login_by_magic_link_note: LoginByMagicLink: 3 paths (confirmed/unconfirmed/error). Domain events via DomainEventBus — need DomainEventBus.subscribe + TestEventPublisher bridge for assertions. Use async:false.
testing_notes.domain_event_test_pattern: EventDispatchHelper.dispatch/2 uses DomainEventBus (not TestEventPublisher port). Bridge via DomainEventBus.subscribe(Context, :event, fn event -> TestEventPublisher.publish(event); :ok end) in setup. Use async:false.
testing_notes.coverage_saturation_note: As of 2026-04-29, codebase has 342+ test files. New code added since last sweep (EmailHtml, Money, PayRate, RateLimitedEmailWorker). Money/PayRate already tested by maintainer. EmailHtml tested by Test Improver (PR #TBD).
testing_notes.mark_invite_registered_test_note: MarkInviteRegistered handler tests already exist on main as of 2026-04-27 (not created by Test Improver - already there).
testing_notes.create_program_rejected_note: PR #634 with CreateProgram/UpdateProgram tests was closed without merge by maintainer. Do not re-attempt.
testing_notes.ci_check_runs_note: No CI check runs appear on Test Improver PRs (total_count: 0 on all checked PRs as of 2026-04-28). CI may only run on push to main or may require maintainer trigger.
testing_notes.email_html_test_note: EmailHtml.esc/1 uses binary pattern matching for HTML escaping (5 entities). wrap/2 escapes footer but NOT inner_html. Tests: 15 pure unit tests in ExUnit.Case async:true.

testing_backlog.description: E2E scale tests for messaging PubSub fan-out (Issue #515)

completed_work.description: 15 pure unit tests for EmailHtml.esc/1 (all 5 HTML entities, XSS input, UTF-8, non-binary coercion) and wrap/2 (structure, default/custom footer escaping)
11 DataCase tests for LoginByMagicLink command (3 paths: confirmed user, unconfirmed user with event dispatch, error cases)
19 pure unit tests for IncidentReportMapper (14) and IncidentReportSummaryMapper (5)
11 DataCase tests for RegisterUser, AnonymizeUser, ChangeEmail accounts commands

backlog_cursor.task_2_last_file: Full sweep complete 2026-04-29: new code (EmailHtml, NotifyIncidentReportedWorker, IncidentReportsLive) found; EmailHtml tested. Other new code trivial or already tested by maintainer.
